**What limits growth?**

<br></br>

1. Compare resource-limited growth with logistic growth.

    a. What is the advantage of resource-limited growth over the logistic growth function?

    b. Are there any disadvantages?

---

2. Examine the influence of $r$, $k_P$, and $Y$ on growth.

    a. At what values of $r$ is growth fastest?

    b. At what values of $k_P$ is growth fastest and nutrient utilization best?

    c. What determines the steepness of the transition to the limiting phase?

    d. Which parameter and which initial value determine the maximum phytoplankton abundance reached? This value corresponds to the carrying capacity $K$ in the logistic model.
